params_used.custom_text:
// Logic for Full Adder using primitive gates
assign n1 = A & B;           // AND for A and B
assign S = n1 | Ci;          // OR for sum with carry input
assign n2 = A ^ Ci;         // XOR for first part of carry
assign n3 = B & Ci;           // AND for second part of carry
assign Co = n2 ^ n3;         // XOR for final carry output
